changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS account_payments ( account_id BIGINT NOT NULL, payment_id Integer NOT NULL, wallet_number character varying(16) , wallet_password character varying(30) , card_holder_name character varying(100) , account_number character varying(16) , expiry_month character varying(2) , expiry_year character varying(2) , cvc character varying(4) , CONSTRAINT account_payments_pkey PRIMARY KEY (account_id, payment_id), CONSTRAINT fk_app_account_11 FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES app_accounts (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_app_payments_11 FOREIGN KEY (payment_id) REFERENCES payment_term (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION );
